basic_details.job_title: HNBGU Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Associate I/ Junior Research Fellow Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Hemvati Nandan Bahuguna Garhwal University (HNBGU) has officially announced the Project Associate I/Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 with 1 vacancy under Advertisement No. HNBGU/ANRF/2026/003. Candidates holding a Four-Year Bachelor's Degree or Master's Degree in Microbiology, Bioinformatics, Biochemistry, Biotechnology, Botany, Environmental Sciences, or other relevant Life Sciences disciplines with a minimum of 55% marks are eligible to apply. Applicants must not exceed 50 years of age. Selected candidates will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 30,000 to Rs. 37,000 per month

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years. Age relaxation will be provided for women, disabled candidates, SC/ST, and OBC as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Four-Year Bachelor's Degree/ Master's Degree in Microbiology/ Bioinformatics/ Biochemistry/ Biotechnology/ Botany/Environmental Sciences/or other relevant fields in Life Sciences with minimum 55% marks or equivalent grade.
qualification.details: Project Associate-I/ Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Four-Year Bachelor's Degree/ Master's Degree in Microbiology/ Bioinformatics/ Biochemistry/ Biotechnology/ Botany/Environmental Sciences/or other relevant fields in Life Sciences with minimum 55% marks or equivalent grade. Desirable: Research experience (academic institutions/industrial/recognized R&D laboratories) in Microbiology, Natural Products, Metabolomics, and/or antimicrobial research. Familiarity with omics approaches (genomics, metabolomics, proteomics), HPLC/LC-MS/GC-MS instrumentation, or bioinformatics tools. Publications in peer-reviewed journals (if any).

salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- + HRA for scholars who are selected through National Eligibility Tests (CSIR-UGC NET, GATE, DBT-JRF, ICMR-JRF) or equivalent national-level examination qualified in the last 1 Year, OR through a selection process through National level examinations conducted by Central Government Departments, their Agencies, and Institutions. Rs. 30,000/- + HRA for others who do not fall under the above category.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on merit and project requirements Interview (online/offline/hybrid mode)
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for HNBGU Project Associate-I/ Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 21-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.text: Project Associate-I/ Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Four-Year Bachelor's Degree/ Master's Degree in Microbiology/ Bioinformatics/ Biochemistry/ Biotechnology/ Botany/Environmental Sciences/or other relevant fields in Life Sciences with minimum 55% marks or equivalent grade. Desirable: Research experience (academic institutions/industrial/recognized R&D laboratories) in Microbiology, Natural Products, Metabolomics, and/or antimicrobial research. Familiarity with omics approaches (genomics, metabolomics, proteomics), HPLC/LC-MS/GC-MS instrumentation, or bioinformatics tools. Publications in peer-reviewed journals (if any).

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for HNBGU Project Associate-I/ Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 21-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: HNBGU Project Associate I/ Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the HNBGU Project Associate-I/ JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 21st July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the essential qualifications for the Project Associate-I/ JRF position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Four-Year Bachelor's Degree or a Master's Degree in Microbiology, Bioinformatics, Biochemistry, Biotechnology, Botany, Environmental Sciences, or related Life Sciences fields with at least 55% marks.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Project Associate-I/ JRF position is 50 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. How will the selection be made for the Project Associate-I/ JRF posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their merit and the project's requirements, followed by an interview which may be conducted online, offline, or in a hybrid mode.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-I/ JRF position?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 30,000/- to Rs. 37,000/- per month, plus House Rent Allowance (HRA). The exact amount depends on the candidate's selection through national-level examinations.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification released by Hemvati Nandan Bahuguna Garhwal University for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for the HNBGU Project Associate-I/ JRF posts?
faq.answer: The application process is entirely via email. Candidates need to send their duly filled application form, biodata, and scanned copies of relevant certificates to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required to be sent with the application?
faq.answer: Along with the application form and biodata/CV, candidates must send scanned self-attested copies of all relevant certificates, including educational qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q9. What should be the subject line of the email for application?
faq.answer: The subject line of the email must be: "Application for JRF – ANRF-PMECRG Project (ANRF/ECRG/2025/000832/LS)".

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is provided in the "Important Links" section of this article for easy access and detailed information.
